sampling_policy.purpose: Use real route geometry and interaction topology only; discard LLM-generated traffic scenarios.
do_not_treat_as_real_distribution: number of aircraft fixed to 12 in generated_scenario
realism_rules: Route direction is fixed by directed_routes and waypoint order.
Opposite-direction same-corridor pairs should be treated as head-on risk if same flight level and overlapping in time.
Route minimum required flight level is retained; sampled initial and target FL must be >= route_min_required_fl.
Use interaction ETA windows only as coarse conflict seeding; validate final samples in BlueSky continuous simulation.
Use generated scenarios only as examples to inspect compiler format, not as training labels or traffic priors.

notes: This file intentionally omits generated_scenario and conflict_report_summary.
Use interaction topology for scenario generation, then verify in BlueSky before accepting labels.
